columns.fragility_note: Annual index; insensitive to intra-year shocks. Large revisions possible.
columns.manipulability_note: National accounts revision cycle; low short-term manipulability.

columns.fragility_note: Sparse pre-1995; many NaN. Interpolation introduces smoothing bias.
columns.manipulability_note: R&D classification can shift across survey waves.

columns.fragility_note: Available only from mid-1990s. Forward-fill over gaps introduces autocorrelation.
columns.manipulability_note: Definition of ICT specialist changed across LFS waves.

columns.fragility_note: Nominal EUR; not deflated. Inflation inflates demand signal post-2010.
columns.manipulability_note: Tax reclassification between environmental and non-environmental.

columns.fragility_note: Near-zero pre-1995; dominated by post-2000 growth. Distribution very skewed.
columns.manipulability_note: Capacity additions vs. installed stock conflation across sources.

notes: FR economie pilot. Data: Eurostat annual series. O=industrial production, R=R&D intensity, I=ICT labour share, demand=env tax revenue, S=solar collector area (symbolic diffusion proxy). Normalisation applied per-column with robust_minmax (2-98th percentile). Missing values interpolated linearly except S (zero-fill before first non-NaN).
